productDisplayName: Spalding Men's Yellow And Black With Graphic Flip Flop
description: CompositionYellow and black slippers with rubber insole and graphic, EVA midsole and TPR outsole, double layer strap with embroidered logo and twill tape toe separatorsshoe care1. Rub surface with clean, damp cloth to remove dust2. Do not machine washEnjoy summer in these zesty yellow flip flops from spalding. The graphic of the Basketball player dunking the ball is inspired by the sport. The yellow insole is soft and the EVA midsole makes the footwear lightweight and cushioned. The wide straps ensure a snug Fit and the twill tape toe separators give added comfort. The TPR outsole with subtle lug detailing enhances grip and stability.
